title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.1575 - Denial of claim, disclosure by applicant not required
text:
375.1575.  Denial of claim, disclosure by applicant not required. — No insurer or its agent or representative shall require any applicant or policyholder to divulge if any insurer has denied any claim of that applicant or policyholder.
(L. 2001 H.B. 328 & 88 § 2 merged with S.B. 186 § 1)
